message:
refactor(unistd): migrate 13 more syscalls to native raw syscalls

Migrate fchmod, fchown, umask, truncate, ftruncate, flock, linkat,
getcwd, getppid, getuid, geteuid, getgid, getegid to use native
syscall wrappers from frankenlibc_core::syscall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
